nasb.text: The fifth for the fifth month was the commander Shamhuth the Izrahite; and in his division were 24,000.

esv.text: The fifth commander, for the fifth month, was Shamhuth the Izrahite; in his division were 24,000.

cnv.text: 五月第五班的軍長是伊斯拉人珊合，他那一班有二萬四千人。

ccb.text: 伊斯拉人珊合负责第五班，在五月当值，他班内有两万四千人。
